# Rarebit One

> Rarebit runs an AI automation farm from Singapore: agents and automations
> handle the workflows; humans direct, review, and ship. Small teams.
> Impossible things.

The best way for an AI assistant to interact with Rarebit is the MCP server
at https://rarebit.one/mcp (Streamable HTTP, JSON-RPC over POST, no auth).
Tools: how_we_work, open_source, intake_questionnaire, submit_inquiry.

## Pages

- [Home](https://rarebit.one/): what the automation farm runs — lead intake,
  content engines, code review & shipping, reporting, back-office ops, QA.
- [Connect](https://rarebit.one/connect): MCP client setup for Claude, Cursor,
  ChatGPT and any Streamable HTTP client, plus an inquiry form fallback.
- [Open source](https://rarebit.one/open-source): the Ruby gems the farm runs
  on — standard_id (auth), standard_singpass (Singpass MyInfo),
  standard_circuit, standard_health, standard_audit, standard_ledger.
- [Field notes](https://rarebit.one/field-notes): build logs from the farm.
- [Privacy](https://rarebit.one/privacy): no cookies, no trackers; inquiries
  land in a private repo and are deleted on request.

## Entity

RAREBIT ONE (UEN 53503079K) — 60 Paya Lebar Road, #06-28, Paya Lebar Square,
Singapore 409051. Contact: https://rarebit.one/connect · GitHub:
https://github.com/rarebit-one
